cases.title: Top drivers by accepted but not completed share

steps.user_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 найди топ-10 водителей с самой высокой долей принятых, но не завершённых поездок среди всех принятых ими заказов. Учитывай только водителей минимум с 20 принятыми заказами. Нужен bar chart.

intent.raw_prompt: За 14 апреля 2026 найди топ-10 водителей с самой высокой долей принятых, но не завершённых поездок среди всех принятых ими заказов. Учитывай только водителей минимум с 20 принятыми заказами. Нужен bar chart.
intent.metric: доля не завершённых поездок среди принятых

actual.sql:
SELECT
  driver_id,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL) AS accepted_cnt,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND driverdone_timestamp IS NULL) AS not_completed_cnt,
  (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND driverdone_timestamp IS NULL)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL), 0)) AS share_unfinished
FROM train
WHERE order_timestamp::date = DATE '2026-04-14'
GROUP BY driver_id
HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE driveraccept_timestamp IS NOT NULL) >= 20
ORDER BY share_unfinished DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 10;

execution.sql_text:
SELECT
  driver_id,
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL) AS accepted_cnt,
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL AND driverdone_timestamp IS NULL) AS not_completed_cnt,
  (
    CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL AND driverdone_timestamp IS NULL) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
      NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL), 0)
  ) AS share_unfinished
FROM train
WHERE
  CAST(order_timestamp AS DATE) = CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
GROUP BY
  driver_id
HAVING
  COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE
    NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL) >= 20
ORDER BY
  share_unfinished DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 10
